titleStmt.title: SII 18.73: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 73. (B.K. No. 112 of 1932-33.) HOMMARAḌI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in front of the temple of Paramēśvara

summary.p: This fragmentary record refers itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva. It mentions Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Chāvuṇḍarāyarasa, the governor of Banavāsi Twelvethousand and his brother Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Barmadēva. It states that the wife (name lost) of Maṇḍalika Jōgapayyarasa, was administering Vommaṟaḍi (modern Hommaraḍi) situated in Bāsavura Hundred-and-forty. The division was being governed by Nelliyammarasa of the Jīmūtavāhana lineage.

The date is lost. On grounds of palaeography the record may be assigned to the reign of Sōmēs11vara I. The mention of Chāvuṇḍarāyarasa as the governor of Banavāsi Twelve-thousand would strengthen this surmise. (See No. 69 above).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nama(ḥ)stuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .
visuddhajñānadēhāya tṛvēdīdivyacakṣuṣē(ḥ) śrīyaḥprāptinimityāya(ṁ) namaḥ sōmārddhadhāriṇē
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi vṛddhipravarddhamānamā
caṁdrārkkātāraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samadhigatapaṁñca mahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ ba
navāsīpuravarēśvaraṁ mahālakṣmīlabdhavaraprasādaṁ tyāgavinōdanāyadācāryyana sahāyaśau
ryyaṁ gaṇḍara gaṇḍaṁ gaṇḍabhēruṇḍaṁ mūṟurāyarāsthānakalibirudamaṇḍaḷikavṛṣabha śaṁkharaṁ ripunṛpabhayaṁ
karaṁ kaligaḷa vogada kayi pratyakṣavikramādityaṁ birudarāditya nāmādi samasta praśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ cāvuṇḍarāyarasarbbanavāsi pannircchāsiramumaṁ sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadināḷuttamire . śrī
ramaṇīyaṁ sale vākśrīramaṇīyaṁ samastanijabhujavijayaśrīramaṇīyaṁ dha
ritriyoḷ rāyanripaṁ . tadanuja . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ birudabarmmara
lōkajagadaḷaṁ kaligaḷa gaṇḍaṁ kaligaṇḍasarabhabhēruṇḍaṁ rāyana siṁga . nuḍidaḍe rāvarēsuṁ maṟevūkkaḍe kāva
paṁjaraṁ kuḍuvaḍe yūntakaiyyaḍugadīvudu hastagataṁ raṇāgradoḷtodaḻdane vūrigo mā surā
yenḍoḍārmmiḍukuvarārkkaḍaṁguvaridirccuvarārssale barmmadēvana . svastyanavarata
haśraphaḷabhōgabhāgini dhvitīyalakṣmīsamāneyarāśritajanakalpa
ntāmaṇi śrīmanmaṇḍalika jōgapayyarasara vistīrṇnavakṣastaḷa
rbbāsavuraṁ 140ṟa baḷiya vommaṟaḍiya sarvvābhyantara
tītaḷakhyātaṁ jīmūtavāhanānvayaprasūtaṁ bandhuja
ttaṁsaṁ śrīmatelliyammarnasaṁ bāsavuranūṟanālvattu
guṇada tavarmmane pusi pāpa dōṣa
suputranesadaṁ vasumatiyoḷ . pu
nakaṁ besakeyyada
padirmmaḍi sale satya sauca
pudō . śivapadāṁbhōja
bīḷanīḷāḷakīpu ®pacā
tparivṛtadharaṇīkhyāta
reḍaṟaṁ kiḍisuva
yaru sakavarṣa
rvvanimitta bra
maniyama
Digital edition of SII 18.73 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
